title: Technical Sales Executive
description:
We are hiring a Technical Sales Executive to drive the introduction and growth of our Smart Building DX solutions (launched in 2023) and related robotics/AI offerings in Singapore and APAC markets.
Reporting to the Technical Team Leader, you will act as a key bridge between technical innovation and customer needs—conducting site assessments, delivering product demonstrations, translating complex features into tangible business value such as cost reduction, improved efficiency, and enhanced user satisfaction, and closing deals in a consultative sales environment. This is a hands-on role ideal for someone with 1–3+ years of sales experience who is passionate about technology, automation, and solving real-world business challenges in facility management and beyond.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead full sales cycles for our Smart Building DX and robotics solutions, from lead generation and opportunity qualification to proposal, demonstration, negotiation, and closure.
  • Conduct on-site customer visits to analyse operations, identify pain points, and validate how our robotic, AI, IoT, and sensor-based solutions deliver measurable ROI.
  • Perform product demonstrations, proof-of-concepts (POCs), and technical presentations to showcase value to facility managers, building owners, and decision-makers.
  • Collaborate closely with internal technical teams, partners, and stakeholders to customize solutions and support product/service development.
  • Execute demand-generation activities to build pipeline in assigned markets.
  • Build and maintain strong, professional relationships with clients and internal teams to achieve individual and company goals.
  • Stay current on robotics, AI, IoT trends, and industry verticals to position our offerings as forward-thinking solutions.
  • Work as a team to meet company overall sales and profit targets.

Requirements

  • Diploma in Business Administration, Information Technology, or equivalent.
  • At least 1–3 years of B2B sales experience (technical sales, solution sales, or related field preferred).
  • Experience in facility management, building services, or selling technology/automation solutions to FM, building owners, or building service providers is highly advantageous.
  • Strong technical curiosity and ability to quickly learn robotics, AI, IoT, sensors, and related technologies.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills in English (both written and spoken); ability to simplify complex technical concepts for non-technical audiences.
  • Proactive, self-motivated mindset with a hands-on, "go-getter" approach and strong problem-solving skills.
  • Out-of-the-box thinker with optimism, empathy, and a genuine passion for automation's impact on business and society.
  • Comfortable working independently in a fast-paced, innovative tech environment while collaborating effectively in a team.
  • Willingness to travel regionally (APAC) as needed.

What we Offer

  • Opportunity to contribute to disruptive robotics and AI innovation in a high-growth potential company.
  • Exposure to international projects and collaboration with top professionals in a dynamic, technology-driven culture.
  • Clear path for professional growth and career advancement within an expanding global organization.
  • Competitive compensation package, performance incentives, and the chance to be part of shaping the future of smart facilities and service robotics.

postedCompany.description:
SoftBank Robotics Singapore is the APAC headquarters and currently oversees China, Hong Kong, Australia and South Korea. (exclude Japan as it is SoftBank Robotics Group headquarter.) It was officially launched in Singapore on 25 September 2019 and in Hong Kong on 17th September 2019. 


SoftBank Robotics APAC currently carry Whiz as our flagship product and work with different partners in each region to bring Whiz into the different sectors.
postedCompany.name: SOFTBANK ROBOTICS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
